clean.description: clean Go change used to exercise the CLI and parser path
clean.diff:
diff --git a/hello.go b/hello.go
index 1111111..2222222 100644
--- a/hello.go
+++ b/hello.go
@@ -1,3 +1,4 @@
 package hello
+
+func message() string { return "hello" }

command_injection.description: exec.Command with sh -c and interpolated user input
command_injection.diff:
diff --git a/runner.go b/runner.go
index 1111111..2222222 100644
--- a/runner.go
+++ b/runner.go
@@ -1,3 +1,7 @@
 package runner
+
+func run(pattern string) error {
+	return exec.Command("sh", "-c", "grep "+pattern).Run()
+}

secret_leak.description: hardcoded token-like secret in a new line
secret_leak.diff:
diff --git a/config.go b/config.go
index 1111111..2222222 100644
--- a/config.go
+++ b/config.go
@@ -1,3 +1,5 @@
 package config
+
+const serviceToken = "ghp_TEST_ONLY_NOT_A_REAL_TOKEN_123456"

goroutine_context_leak.diff:
diff --git a/worker.go b/worker.go
index 1111111..2222222 100644
--- a/worker.go
+++ b/worker.go
@@ -1,3 +1,9 @@
 package worker
+
+func startWorker() {
+	go func() {
+		poll()
+	}()
+}

resource_leak.description: file, HTTP body, and SQL rows leaks plus a cross-hunk safe close boundary

ignored_error.diff:
diff --git a/cleanup.go b/cleanup.go
index 1111111..2222222 100644
--- a/cleanup.go
+++ b/cleanup.go
@@ -1,3 +1,8 @@
 package cleanup
+
+func cleanup(resp *http.Response, w io.Writer) {
+	_ = resp.Body.Close()
+	_, _ = fmt.Fprintf(w, "ok")
+}

database_lifecycle.description: database handle and transaction are opened without lifecycle closure
database_lifecycle.diff:
diff --git a/store.go b/store.go
index 1111111..2222222 100644
--- a/store.go
+++ b/store.go
@@ -1,3 +1,12 @@
 package store
+
+func save(ctx context.Context, dsn string) error {
+	db, err := sql.Open("mysql", dsn)
+	if err != nil { return err }
+	tx, err := db.BeginTx(ctx, nil)
+	if err != nil { return err }
+	_, err = tx.ExecContext(ctx, "update users set active = 1")
+	return err
+}

missing_tests.description: exported function changed without a matching test diff
missing_tests.diff:
diff --git a/api.go b/api.go
index 1111111..2222222 100644
--- a/api.go
+++ b/api.go
@@ -1,3 +1,5 @@
 package api
+
+func ExportedFeature(input string) string { return input }

rename_and_binary.description: rename, deleted file, and git binary patch parser coverage
rename_and_binary.diff:
diff --git a/old_name.go b/new_name.go
similarity index 88%
rename from old_name.go
rename to new_name.go
--- a/old_name.go
+++ b/new_name.go
@@ -1 +1 @@
-package oldname
+package newname
diff --git a/logo.png b/logo.png
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..1111111
GIT binary patch
literal 0
diff --git a/deleted.go b/deleted.go
deleted file mode 100644
index 1111111..0000000
--- a/deleted.go
+++ /dev/null
@@ -1 +0,0 @@
-package deleted

negative_controls.description: similar but safe changes that should not produce high-confidence findings
negative_controls.diff:
diff --git a/safe.go b/safe.go
index 1111111..2222222 100644
--- a/safe.go
+++ b/safe.go
@@ -1,3 +1,15 @@
 package safe
+
+func safeReview(ctx context.Context, pattern string, name string) error {
+	cmd := exec.Command("grep", pattern, "file.txt")
+	_ = cmd
+	f, err := os.Open(name)
+	if err != nil {
+		return err
+	}
+	defer f.Close()
+	go func(ctx context.Context) {
+		<-ctx.Done()
+	}(ctx)
+	_ = fmt.Sprintf("%s", pattern)
+	return nil
+}
diff --git a/safe_test.go b/safe_test.go
index 1111111..2222222 100644
--- a/safe_test.go
+++ b/safe_test.go
@@ -1,3 +1,4 @@
 package safe
+
+func TestSafeReview(t *testing.T) {}

duplicate_finding.description: two security rule matches on the same file, line, and category should dedupe
duplicate_finding.diff:
diff --git a/duplicate.go b/duplicate.go
index 1111111..2222222 100644
--- a/duplicate.go
+++ b/duplicate.go
@@ -1,3 +1,5 @@
 package duplicate
+
+func run(pattern string) error { const serviceToken = "ghp_TEST_ONLY_NOT_A_REAL_TOKEN_123456"; return exec.Command("sh", "-c", "grep "+pattern).Run() }

sandbox_failure.description: sandbox preflight failure should produce warnings without aborting the review
sandbox_failure.diff:
diff --git a/hello.go b/hello.go
index 1111111..2222222 100644
--- a/hello.go
+++ b/hello.go
@@ -1,3 +1,4 @@
 package hello
+
+func message() string { return "hello" }
